description: Core verified facts about the Iran-Israel-USA conflict.
facts: Iran launched a coordinated strike targeting Israeli military installations in the Negev desert.
The strike consisted of exactly 32 drones and 14 ballistic missiles.
The Israeli Air Force and Iron Dome engaged the incoming projectiles.
Initial reports and IDF confirmation state an 85% interception rate by the Iron Dome system.
The US confirmed the deployment of an additional carrier strike group, specifically the USS Eisenhower, to the Eastern Mediterranean.
The USS Eisenhower remains on station in the Eastern Mediterranean.
CENTCOM has repositioned B-1B Lancers to Al Udeid Air Base in Qatar.
The Israeli military reports 3 soldiers killed and 47 injured across all strike sites.
The UN Security Council called an emergency session to address the escalation.
No ceasefire has been announced or signed by any party; military operations are ongoing.
Oil futures surged significantly, with Brent crude rising above $112/barrel.
